narrative:
Washington township has 3,085 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
